user.title: Pick the IIC-400's tuya-local device
user.description: Choose the tuya-local config entry for your Inkbird IIC-400. Credentials (device ID, local key, host) are copied from it - you won't need to re-enter them.

zones_sensor.title: Confirm the "zones running" sensor
zones_sensor.description: Pick the tuya-local sensor entity that reports the zones-running bitmask (DP 107) for this device. It's usually pre-selected below.

abort.no_tuya_local_entries: No tuya-local devices found. Set up the tuya-local integration and add your IIC-400 to it first.
abort.incomplete_tuya_local_entry: The selected tuya-local entry is missing device_id/local_key/host - reconfigure it in tuya-local first.
